case_for: Cooper has flashed high weekly ceilings (wk7 16.6, wk14 15.5) showing he can still deliver big games that clear the 12-point threshold when targets flow his way.
case_against: His recent floor is extremely shaky with three games under 8.5 points (wk8, wk11, wk13), suggesting inconsistent target share or role that could easily produce another sub-12 outing.
